sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Singlamteh kiang kong pai hi
Tha le sum lo, mit taw pi
Na dang bangmah man lo pi
Hotna cing ka zong ding hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Topa Nangmah kong muang zo
Singlamteh tung si Tuuno
Na Singlamteh kong bel zo
Hong hon aw, tu’n hong hon aw.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nang kong lung gulhna sawt hi
Ka gitloh sawt lua zo hi
Jesuh in damtak hong ci
“Na mawhna Kong sawp ding hi”

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka vekpi’n kong ki pia ta
Ka lawm, ka hun, ka neihsa
Ka vekpi’n kapum kakha,
Nang’ a ka hi khin nuam ta.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Na thuciamte ka muang hi
Na si pha tu’n ka phawk hi
Ka lungsim ka niam khiat hi
Nangmah tawh ka si khawm hi.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Jesuh ka lung sung tumzo,
Ama sung ka kicingzo;
Ka pumpi’n ka dam siangzo,
Minthang hen, Pasian Tuuno.
